coordinateConvention.note: JSON x/y are Figma semantics. Unity root uses center anchor; child coords are relative to parent top-left.

layoutAdjustments.note: Unity baked x/y no longer matches template Auto Layout; layoutMode set to NONE for these nodes.

node.name: 今日成绩小结：总分悄悄 +23，数学状态不错。
node.characters: 今日成绩小结：总分悄悄 +23，数学状态不错。

item.text: 今日成绩小结：总分悄悄 +23，数学状态不错。
